input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: if a single line of leds is used, the minimum length is 150 mm.

T.3.4.4 If a single line of LEDs is used, the minimum length is 150 mm.

final_answer: If a single line of LEDs is used, the minimum length is 150 mm.
